name: Marinara Sauce II
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Ripe Italian plum tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heavy skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Sauté the onion and garlic until just transparent, about 5-8 minutes.
3. Stir in all the other ingredients except the mushrooms.
4. Simmer over low heat for 30 minutes.
5. Add the mushrooms and season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Simmer an additional 5 minutes.
7. Serve hot.
